name: Orb Weaver
description: The orb weaver is still the park's most common large spider and a serious threat to anyone who underestimates it. It is not the toughest true spider, but it punishes mistakes very well.
behavior: It patrols fixed patches of ground, spins webs, and sleeps in nests surrounded by spiderlings and orb weaver juniors. If you break nearby webs or disturb the nest, it activates almost immediately.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile toward the player and mixes frontal combos with web shots to pin you in place. If a web catches you, break out immediately before it chains the next attack.
interactionWithCreatures: It shares space with other spiders and usually ignores most creatures until they stray into its webs or route. Smaller prey caught in the web will usually trigger aggression.
strategy: Tier 1 or 2 gear is enough if you keep the rhythm. Respect the combo, dodge or block the web shot, and use charged attacks to punish its defensive stance when it tries to hold ground.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 50. 3-Combo Bite: 30. Charged Bite: 65. Web Shot: 40.

inflicts: All direct attacks deal stabbing damage. The web shot immobilizes or slows until the web is broken.

abilities.name: 3-Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains three blockable bites with very little downtime.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: It snarls, winds up, and lunges forward. It breaks guard if you do not perfect block it.

abilities.name: Web Shot
abilities.description: It fires an unblockable web that creates webs on impact.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It spins a web in front of itself and nullifies frontal light attacks until you interrupt it with a charged hit.

abilities.name: Feint
abilities.description: It fakes the start of a bite before switching quickly into another attack.
